---
title: "Code"
pagetitle: "Code — Werner L. Hernani-Limarino"
description: "Open-source replication repositories, live dashboards, and machine learning tools for poverty mapping, small area estimation, distributional monitoring, and social protection targeting in Bolivia and Latin America."
toc: false
---

Open-source replication repositories and data tools. All code on [github.com/wernerhl](https://github.com/wernerhl).

::: {.section-rule}
Research Replication
:::

::: {.repo-grid}

::: {.repo-card}
#### [poverty-map-bolivia](https://github.com/wernerhl/poverty-map-bolivia)
Small area estimation of poverty and nutrition in Bolivia (CPV 2024 + EH 2024). DRF + BYM2 + Optimal Transport pipeline in R.
[SAE]{.repo-tag} [R]{.repo-tag} [Bolivia]{.repo-tag}
:::

::: {.repo-card}
#### [tail-test-replication](https://github.com/wernerhl/tail-test-replication)
Replication code for *The Tail Test*: factorial simulation on DRF advantage in small area estimation. Mexico 2015 Intercensal Census.
[SAE]{.repo-tag} [R]{.repo-tag} [Simulation]{.repo-tag}
:::

::: {.repo-card}
#### [BOL-NoReturns](https://github.com/wernerhl/BOL-NoReturns)
Bolivia No Returns paper — distributional incidence of Bolivia's 2024–2025 currency crisis.
[Incidence]{.repo-tag} [Bolivia]{.repo-tag} [R]{.repo-tag}
:::

::: {.repo-card}
#### [iat-pilot](https://github.com/wernerhl/iat-pilot)
Implicit Association Test pilot on racial bias in Latin America.
[Gender & Norms]{.repo-tag} [LAC]{.repo-tag}
:::

:::

::: {.section-rule}
Data Pipelines
:::

::: {.repo-grid}

::: {.repo-card}
#### [BOL\_harmonization](https://github.com/wernerhl/BOL_harmonization)
Bolivia Household Survey (Encuesta de Hogares) harmonization pipeline, 2011–2024. Standardizes 14 rounds for panel-consistent distributional analysis.
[Data]{.repo-tag} [Stata]{.repo-tag} [Bolivia]{.repo-tag}
:::

::: {.repo-card}
#### [BOL.data](https://github.com/wernerhl/BOL.data)
Earlier harmonization of Bolivian household surveys. Legacy version.
[Data]{.repo-tag} [Bolivia]{.repo-tag}
:::

:::

::: {.section-rule}
Dashboards and Tools
:::

::: {.repo-grid}

::: {.repo-card}
#### [ledgers-bolivia](https://github.com/wernerhl/ledgers-bolivia)
*Ledgers of the Self-Employed* — live dashboard for informal firm accounting in Bolivia.
[Dashboard]{.repo-tag} [Informality]{.repo-tag} [Bolivia]{.repo-tag}
:::

::: {.repo-card}
#### [bolivia-ews](https://github.com/wernerhl/bolivia-ews)
Bolivia P2P Early Warning System — real-time distributional monitoring tool.
[Dashboard]{.repo-tag} [Monitoring]{.repo-tag} [Bolivia]{.repo-tag}
:::

:::
